title: Security readiness operacional y cierre de Fase B
wave: Ola 3 — Seguridad operacional, aprobación humana y ejecución controlada

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-34 orquesta capacidades existentes de Fase B y agrega gates/reportes dependency-free. No introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, UI, backend, sandbox real ni ejecución destructiva. Es un cierre operacional de fase, no una decisión arquitectónica nueva.

pass_criteria: Security readiness verifies PolicyEngine approval binding.
Security readiness verifies controlled tests.run smoke execution.
Policy simulation matrix covers missing, valid, wrong-scope and expired approvals.
SecretGuard, PromptInjectionGuard and ToolInjectionGuard are checked with synthetic payloads.
Fase B closure checklist and report exist.
block_criteria: An approval-gated action passes without valid approval.
Fase B closes without checklist or closure report.
Patch apply, refactor execution, Git write or deploy are enabled.
risks: Security readiness is not a full security certification.
Policy simulation uses deterministic fixtures and does not replace red teaming.
Fase C still requires sandbox and rollback before destructive actions.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-35 — Inicio Fase C: ingeniería de repositorio y sandbox controlado
notes: FUNC-SPRINT-34 corrective hardening disables host pytest plugin autoload for controlled pytest subprocesses.
